MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-31-2002 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Richard Eugene Madsen, Esq., appearing in Propria Persona via telephone conference.
Order to Show Cause to plaintiff for failure to file Proof of Service, obtain answer or enter default is scheduled this day. At the request of plaintiff. Court ordered case dismissed without prejudice. Proceedings reported by: Leticia Perez. (212)

MINI MINUTES: Order to Show Cause to Richard Eugene Madsen, for failure to file proof of service, obtain an answer(s) from or enter default(s) against defendant(s), is heard this day.
